//: Type-checks the Worker entry (the only real type gate — esbuild/wrangler strip types without checking). This entry reuses the `examples/secure-api` app factory, so two resolution facts differ from the cf-crud worker: (1) the example installs its OWN copies of `@smithy-hono/security-core` + `hono` (tarball + pinned 4.12.x) which DRIFT from the root copies adapter-cf is built against (branded OidcVerifier / hono GET_MATCH_RESULT skew); `paths` below pins BOTH sides of the boundary to the single root copy so the types unify. (2) secure-api uses `node:async_hooks` (AsyncLocalStorage) — a Node builtin Workers provide under the `nodejs_compat` flag — so `types:[node]` is required here (unlike the purely web-standard cf/cf-crud workers).
